body: Marcus, great catching up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Fellows](org/breakthrough-energy-fellows) summit last week — always good to have a real conversation amid all the noise at those things. I wanted to follow up on our chat about the carbon capture infrastructure space, specifically around the two companies I mentioned that [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) has been tracking closely heading into their Series A rounds. Given your team's recent moves in the climate stack, I think there could be a genuine co-investment angle worth exploring before either process gets formally kicked off. Would you be open to a call sometime in the next week or two so I can share more color on the deal dynamics? I'll have my assistant reach out to find a time that works.
